news.t: First Eagle Active ETF Platform Surpasses $3 Billion in Assets Less than 18 Months after Launch

holdings.infoBox: USFE is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 5.30%, ONEOK at 4.50%, Meta Platforms at 4.27%, Oracle at 3.83%, and The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation at 3.76%.

overview.description: The First Eagle US Equity ETF (USFE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund invests in a diversified portfolio of US equity securities across all market capitalizations using active stock selection. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation USFE was launched on Jan 27, 2026 and is issued by First Eagle.

data.title: First Eagle Active ETF Platform Surpasses $3 Billion in Assets Less than 18 Months after Launch
data.text: NEW YORK NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Eagle Investments' actively managed ETF platform has exceeded $3 billion in assets under management (AUM) as of May 12th, 2026, less than 18 months after its ...
